title: Invisalign & Dental Implants Specialists in Delhi & Gurgaon
heading: Nanda Dental Clinic - Specialist Invisalign & Dental Implant Centre
description: Nanda Dental Clinic offers expert Invisalign, 3D-guided implants & veneers in Gurgaon and Delhi. Led by Dr. Prashant & Dr. Smriti Nanda, 20+ yrs exp.
text: Invisalign & Dental Implants Specialists in Delhi & Gurgaon Facebook Profile Instagram Profile Youtube Profile Phone Numbers +91 8920235849 Email Address [email protected] About Us Services Invisalign Smile Makeovers/Veneers Dental Implants Orthodontics Zoom Teeth Whitening Crown and Bridge Periodontics General Dentistry Digital OPG Digital Xray Orthodontic Instructions Post Surgical Instructions Invisalign International Patients Testimonials Patients Speak Video Testimonials Gallery Smile Gallery Happy Patients Clinic Tour Delhi Clinic Tour Gurgaon Blog Contact Us Gurgaon Dental Clinic Delhi Dental Clinic Nanda Dental Clinic - Specialist Invisalign & Dental Implant Centre Specialist Invisalign, Implant & Cosmetic Centre World-Class Dentistry in South Delhi & Gurgaon (Golf Course Road). Creating confident smiles since 2012 with 3D-Guided Implants, Invisible Aligners, and Painless Care.​ Book Your Consultation View Our Smile Gallery Two Decades of Excellence. Two Premium Locations. For over 14 years , Nanda Dental has been the trusted name for specialist dental care in South Delhi (Defence Colony) and Gurgaon . We are a dedicated Invisalign & Implant Centre led by Dr. Smriti Nanda (Platinum Elite Invisalign Provider) and Dr. Prashant Nanda (Implantologist), established in 2012. Moving beyond traditional dentistry, we combine our clinical expertise with the world’s most advanced technology—including the iTero Lumina Scanner —to deliver precise, impression-free treatments. Whether you need Invisible Aligners, 3D-Guided Implants, or Porcelain Veneers, we design smiles that restore your confidence. Now expanding to our premium centre on Golf Course Road. We are proud to serve the National Capital Region from our two signature clinics Defence Colony (South Delhi) Our flagship centre continues to serve our loyal patient base in Defence Colony, Greater Kailash, Golf Links , Jorbagh and South Extension with the same dedicated team you trust. Golf Course Road (Gurgaon) We have moved to our new premium dental clinic on Golf Course Road (near One Horizon Center). Now serving DLF Phase 1, 2, 5 &  the DLF Golf Links. Serving Gurgaon’s Premier Neighbourhoods Conveniently Located for Gurgaon’s Premier Residences Our new Golf Course Road clinic is positioned to offer effortless access for patients residing in Gurgaon’s most established and exclusive neighborhoods. We are just minutes away from: Read More What Our Clients Say More Videos Successfully Treated 1,00,000+ Patients Book An Appointment Why Choose Us? Facebook Envelope Dr Jayna Gandhi Nanda BDS, MDS (Rohtak.) Dr. Jayna Gandhi Nanda is a highly qualified paediatric dentist and preventive dentistry specialist at Nanda Dental Clinic in Defence Colony and Gurgaon.
